item.name: Spectral Kotsu Zetsu
item.description:
The bone-like tongues of these spectral wavekin are surprisingly sturdy despite their crystalline appearance, and are often used by highly skilled artisans to craft priceless accessories.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 3 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: When the spectral currents affect a kotsu zetsu, its bone-like tongue takes on the same glow as its scales. These appendages are highly valued by local artisans, who utilize special tools to clean and carve them into luminous pendants and finery.
